name: scss-css-path-intellisense
description: Go to definition, document links, and alias-based path auto-completion for SCSS/CSS import paths.

scssPathJump.enableNodeModules.description: Resolve bare package paths from node_modules when possible.

scssPathJump.enableUrl.description: Enable path resolution for url(...) references.

scssPathJump.enableDocumentLinks.description: Enable clickable links for import path strings.

scssPathJump.enablePathCompletion.description: Enable path auto-completion in SCSS/CSS import-like syntax.

scssPathJump.preferExtensionless.description: Prefer extensionless insertion text for style file completion items.

scssPathJump.showPartialFiles.description: Show Sass partial files (for example, _button.scss) in completion candidates.

scssPathJump.completionMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of path completion candidates returned per request.
